debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
P : Type u_2
inst✝⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup V
inst✝³ : InnerProductSpace ℝ V
inst✝² : MetricSpace P
inst✝¹ : NormedAddTorsor V P
inst✝ : Fact (finrank ℝ V = 2)
⊢ ∃ c,
    0 < c ∧
      ∀ {n : ℕ},
        1 < n →
          ∀ {S : Finset P},
            S.card = n →
              ((↑S).Pairwise fun x y => 1 ≤ dist x y) →
                ∃ l,
                  finrank ℝ ↥l.direction = 1 ∧
                    (∃ p₁ p₂, p₁ ∈ S ∧ p₂ ∈ S ∧ l.SOppSide p₁ p₂) ∧ ∀ p ∈ S, c * ↑n ^ (-1 / 3) ≤ Metric.infDist p ↑l

failed_attempts:
exact ⟨1/4, by norm_num, fun {n} hn {S} hcard hpairwise => by
    sorry⟩

exact ⟨1, one_pos, fun {n} hn {S} hS hpw => by
    have : (2 : ℕ) ≤ n := hn
    have hne : S.Nonempty := Finset.card_pos.mp (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le Nat.one_lt_two this ▸ hS ▸ hn)
    obtain ⟨p, hp⟩ := hne
    obtain ⟨q, hq, hpq⟩ : ∃ q ∈ S, p ≠ q := by
      have : 1 < S.card := hS ▸ hn
      exact Finset.exists_ne_of_one_lt_card this p hp
    classical
    sorry⟩

exact ⟨1, one_pos, fun {n} hn {S} hS hpw => by
    have h2 : 2 ≤ n := hn
    obtain ⟨p₁, hp₁, p₂, hp₂, hne⟩ := Finset.one_lt_card_iff.mp (hS ▸ hn)
    have hdist : 1 ≤ dist p₁ p₂ := hpw hp₁ hp₂ hne
    sorry⟩

exact ⟨1/4, by norm_num, fun {n} hn {S} hcard hpairwise => by
    sorry⟩
exact ⟨1, one_pos, fun hn hcard hpw => by sorry⟩
exact ⟨1, one_pos, fun _ _ _ => ⟨⊥, by simp, ⟨default, default, by simp⟩, fun _ _ => by positivity⟩⟩

use 1 / (4 * Real.sqrt 3)
  constructor
  · positivity
  · intro n hn S hcard hpairwise
    sorry

refine ⟨1, one_pos, ?_⟩
  intro n hn S hcard hpairwise
  sorry
exact ⟨1/4, by norm_num, fun _ _ _ => ⟨⊥, by simp, ⟨default, default, by simp⟩, fun _ _ => by simp⟩⟩
exact ⟨1, one_pos, fun _ _ _ => ⟨⊥, by simp, ⟨default, default, by simp⟩, fun _ _ => by simp⟩⟩
